recommendations.title: Misbehaviour

recommendations.title: Killer of Sheep
recommendations.overview: An African-American man working at a slaughterhouse in the Watts area of Los Angeles leads a dissatisfied and listless existence.

recommendations.title: Winter on Fire: Ukraine's Fight for Freedom
recommendations.overview: Over 93 days in Ukraine, what started as peaceful student demonstrations became a violent revolution and full-fledged civil rights movement.

recommendations.title: Amistad
recommendations.overview: In 1839, the slave ship Amistad set sail from Cuba to America. During the long trip, Cinque leads the slaves in an unprecedented uprising. They are then held prisoner in Connecticut, and their release becomes the subject of heated debate. Freed slave

recommendations.title: Green Book
recommendations.overview: Tony Lip, a bouncer in 1962, is hired to drive pianist Don Shirley on a tour through the Deep South in the days when African Americans, forced to find alternate accommodations and services due to segregation laws below the Mason-Dixon Line, relied on

recommendations.title: Poor Things
recommendations.overview: Brought back to life by an unorthodox scientist, a young woman runs off with a lawyer on a whirlwind adventure across the continents. Free from the prejudices of her times, she grows steadfast in her purpose to stand for equality and liberation.

recommendations.title: Train Dreams
recommendations.overview: A logger leads a life of quiet grace as he experiences love and loss during an era of monumental change in early 20th-century America.

recommendations.title: Nekrotronic
recommendations.overview: A man discovers that he is part of a secret sect of magical beings who hunt down and destroy demons in the internet.

recommendations.title: American History X
recommendations.overview: Derek Vineyard is paroled after serving 3 years in prison for killing two African-American men. Through his brother, Danny Vineyard's narration, we learn that before going to prison, Derek was a skinhead and the leader of a violent white supremacist

recommendations.title: Sting
recommendations.overview: After raising an unnervingly talented spider in secret, 12-year-old Charlotte must face the truth about her pet and fight for her family's survival.
